sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 8. NPE Loss Coverage (NPE LC)
sections.description: Overview of templates related to non-performing exposures and their loss coverage.

sections.heading: 8.1. General remarks
sections.description: General information about the NPE loss coverage templates.

sections.heading: 8.2. C 35.01 – THE CALCULATION OF DEDUCTIONS FOR NON-PERFORMING EXPOSURES (NPE LC1)
sections.description: Instructions for calculating deductions for non-performing exposures.

sections.heading: C 35.02 – MINIMUM COVERAGE REQUIREMENTS AND EXPOSURE VALUES OF NON-PERFORMING EXPOSURES EXCLUDING FORBORNE EXPOSURES THAT FALL UNDER ARTICLE 47C (6) OF REGULATION (EU) NO 575/2013 (NPE LC2)
sections.description: Instructions for minimum coverage requirements and exposure values of non-performing exposures.

sections.heading: C 35.03 – MINIMUM COVERAGE REQUIREMENTS AND EXPOSURE VALUES OF NON-PERFORMING FORBORNE EXPOSURES THAT FALL UNDER ARTICLE 47C (6) OF REGULATION (EU) NO 575/2013 (NPE LC3)
sections.description: Instructions for minimum coverage requirements and exposure values of non-performing forborne exposures.

C 35.01.name: THE CALCULATION OF DEDUCTIONS FOR NON-PERFORMING EXPOSURES (NPE LC1)
C 35.01.description: Reports the applicable amount of insufficient coverage for non-performing exposures.
C 35.01.section_heading: 8.2. C 35.01 – THE CALCULATION OF DEDUCTIONS FOR NON-PERFORMING EXPOSURES (NPE LC1)

C 35.02.name: MINIMUM COVERAGE REQUIREMENTS AND EXPOSURE VALUES OF NON-PERFORMING EXPOSURES EXCLUDING FORBORNE EXPOSURES THAT FALL UNDER ARTICLE 47C (6) OF REGULATION (EU) NO 575/2013 (NPE LC2)
C 35.02.description: Calculates the total minimum coverage requirements for non-performing exposures excluding forborne exposures.
C 35.02.section_heading: C 35.02 – MINIMUM COVERAGE REQUIREMENTS AND EXPOSURE VALUES OF NON-PERFORMING EXPOSURES EXCLUDING FORBORNE EXPOSURES THAT FALL UNDER ARTICLE 47C (6) OF REGULATION (EU) NO 575/2013 (NPE LC2)

C 35.03.name: MINIMUM COVERAGE REQUIREMENTS AND EXPOSURE VALUES OF NON-PERFORMING FORBORNE EXPOSURES THAT FALL UNDER ARTICLE 47C (6) OF REGULATION (EU) NO 575/2013 (NPE LC3)
C 35.03.description: Calculates the total minimum coverage requirements for non-performing forborne exposures.
C 35.03.section_heading: C 35.03 – MINIMUM COVERAGE REQUIREMENTS AND EXPOSURE VALUES OF NON-PERFORMING FORBORNE EXPOSURES THAT FALL UNDER ARTICLE 47C (6) OF REGULATION (EU) NO 575/2013 (NPE LC3)
